mapper.sql: from payment_transaction_flow tf left join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = tf.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id left join payment_order po on po.id = tf.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id left join payment_refund_order ro on ro.id = tf.refund_order_id and ro.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id

where tf.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
and ( tf.flow_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or tf.flow_type like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or bo.biz_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or po.pay_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ro.refund_order_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

select tf.id, tf.flow_no as flowNo, tf.business_order_id as businessOrderId, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, tf.payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, po.pay_order_no as payOrderNo, tf.refund_order_id as refundOrderId, ro.refund_order_no as refundOrderNo, tf.flow_type as flowType, tf.amount, bo.currency, tf.created_at as createTime, tf.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: order by tf.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select id, flow_no as flowNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, refund_order_id as refundOrderId, flow_type as flowType, amount, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt from payment_transaction_flow where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and payment_order_id = #{paymentOrderId} and refund_order_id is null and flow_type = 'CHANNEL_FEE' order by created_at desc limit 1

select id, flow_no as flowNo, business_order_id as businessOrderId, payment_order_id as paymentOrderId, refund_order_id as refundOrderId, flow_type as flowType, amount, tenant_id as tenantId, created_by as createdBy, created_at as createdAt, updated_by as updatedBy, updated_at as updatedAt from payment_transaction_flow where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and refund_order_id = #{refundOrderId} and flow_type = 'CHANNEL_FEE' order by created_at desc limit 1
